ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the building */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the building administration */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  "renovated_year" INTEGER /* Year the building was last renovated */,
  "total_floors" INTEGER /* Total number of floors in the building */,
  "sq_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the building */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude coordinate of the building */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude coordinate of the building */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact number for the building */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the room is located */,
  "room_name" TEXT /* Name of the room */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., Learning Theatre, Break out space) */,
  "seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the room */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the photo of the room */,
  "virtual_tour_url" TEXT /* URL to the virtual tour of the room */,
  "disability_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the room has disability access (true/false) */,
  "floor" INTEGER /* Floor number of the room */,
  "sq_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the room */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last room inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled room inspection */,
  "maintenance_needed" INTEGER /* Indicates if maintenance is needed (true/false) */,
  "last_cleaned_date" TEXT /* Date the room was last cleaned */,
  "cleaning_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of cleaning (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the room type (e.g., Lecture Hall, Collaborative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the room type */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity for the room type */,
  "standard_equipment" TEXT /* Standard equipment included in rooms of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room with this amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity (e.g., Projector, Whiteboard) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the amenity in the room */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance for the amenity */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance for the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room being booked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date of the booking */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the booking */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the booking */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event or class being booked */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event or class */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, cancelled, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Faculty, Student, Staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Faculty, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., booking, cancellation) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the room */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review has been approved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room where the event is held */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event organizer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_management" (
  "management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the facility management record */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building being managed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "maintenance_needed" INTEGER /* Indicates if maintenance is needed (true/false) */,
  "last_cleaned_date" TEXT /* Date the building was last cleaned */,
  "cleaning_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of building cleaning (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the management record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the management record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_management_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the manager account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the manager account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)
